title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models and agents such as Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers. It enables workflow routing where one agent can plan a task, hand it to Claude Code for implementation, then route the output to Codex for review, with governance and cross-device session support.
writeup: The video covers Omnigent, a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models and agents, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi, treating them as interchangeable workers. The core idea is workflow routing: one agent plans a task, hands implementation to Claude Code, then routes the output to Codex for review, with governance controls and cross-device session support layered in. The takeaway is a single orchestration layer that swaps agents per stage rather than committing to one harness, with human-in-the-loop oversight built into the flow.
